description_long: This object is a large, rectangular filing cabinet with a textured, light brown exterior that resembles a fabric or laminate finish. The cabinet features a single, prominent drawer on one side, identifiable by a dark rectangular handle and a small metallic label holder above it. The top surface is flat and unadorned except for a narrow, recessed slot, possibly for document insertion or ventilation. The sides and back are plain, with the same ribbed texture running horizontally. The overall construction appears sturdy and boxy, with sharp, clean edges and a slightly slanted top. The cabinet is designed for high-capacity storage, likely intended for use in environments requiring secure and organized document management.
description: A large, textured light brown filing cabinet with a single drawer, flat top, and a recessed slot. It features a metallic handle and label holder, designed for secure document storage.
description_view_0: The top and two sides of the cabinet are visible, showing the ribbed texture and a recessed slot on the top surface.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the main drawer with a dark handle and a metallic label holder, as well as the recessed slot on the top.
description_view_2: The opposite side and top are visible, highlighting the plain, textured surface and the position of the recessed slot.
description_view_3: The back view shows a featureless, flat surface with the ribbed texture and the recessed slot on the top.
